project.name: ThoughtCodec
project.description: A bilingual skill library for decompression and compression based AI workflows.
project.descriptionZh: 一个基于解压与压缩理念的中英双语 AI 工作流 Skill 库。

skills.title: Architecture Scaffolding
skills.description: Convert business logic into architecture diagrams, data models, API contracts, and implementation scaffolds.
skills.descriptionZh: 将业务逻辑转化为架构图、数据模型、API 契约和实施脚手架。

skills.title: SOP Instantiation
skills.titleZh: 标准作业程序实例化引擎
skills.description: Convert broad objectives into concrete operating procedures with milestones, artifacts, and checks.
skills.descriptionZh: 将宏观目标转化为包含里程碑、产出物和检查点的具体作业程序。

skills.title: Rule And Prompt Optimizer
skills.description: Convert repeated feedback, corrections, and conversation traces into durable prompt rules or skill updates.
skills.descriptionZh: 将重复反馈、纠错和对话轨迹转化为长期可用的提示词规则或 Skill 更新。

skills.title: Code Abstraction And Encapsulation
skills.description: Convert repeated or messy code into reusable components, clean interfaces, and engineering rules.
skills.descriptionZh: 将重复或混乱的代码转化为可复用组件、清晰接口和工程规则。

skills.title: Personal Methodology Engine
skills.description: Build a closed-loop personal AI working system that decompresses intent and compresses feedback into reusable methodology.
skills.descriptionZh: 构建一个将意图解压为执行、并将反馈压缩为可复用方法论的个人 AI 工作系统。
